title: The Promise to Grow Stronger: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Ah... Gloriosa! This certainly brings back memories!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: ...So you guys know old man Rayleigh?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No more than a mouthful, you hear...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: for to eat... is to live!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You have my thanks for delivering it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So slow!! Just how preoccupied were you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I do not have much time left...
